# PostgreSQL Expert Skill

This folder contains the embedded repository skill for PostgreSQL-aware Copilot work in pgPacTool.

## Files

- `SKILL.md` — durable expert rules for PostgreSQL version-aware code, compare logic, extraction,
  script generation, and documentation in this repository.

## Scope

Use this skill when changing:

- PostgreSQL object models
- extraction queries
- compare or deployment logic
- publish/script generation
- permissions/security handling
- PostgreSQL version support documentation
